description_long: This is a rectangular cake with a sculpted, elongated green and yellow decorative element on top, resembling a crocodile or dragon, placed on a table draped with a white cloth. The cake is adorned with small, colorful decorations, possibly made of fondant or icing, distributed around the edges. The tablecloth is slightly wrinkled and hangs over the sides, with some red and orange accents visible. The cake sits on a wooden floor, suggesting it is part of a display or celebration in an indoor or semi-public urban setting. The overall presentation is festive and eye-catching, with a focus on the central sculpted figure. The cake appears to be a single-tiered, novelty cake designed for a themed event.
description: A rectangular cake with a sculpted green and yellow decorative figure on top, displayed on a white cloth-covered table with colorful accents. The cake is festive and visually striking, likely for a themed celebration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the cake and the sculpted green-yellow figure on top, with the tablecloth draping neatly over the table.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated shape of the decorative figure and the colorful accents along the tablecloth's edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the sculpted figure and the smooth, uninterrupted white tablecloth surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the table's legs and the draped cloth, as well as the side profile of the cake's decoration.
